title: Dubai Air Taxi Network Takes Flight: Joby Completes Landmark Flight
text: Joby Aviation completed the first electric air taxi point-to-point flight in the UAE, flying from its Margham test facility to Al Maktoum International Airport on November 9, 2025. This 17-minute piloted flight demonstrates the company's readiness for commercial operations in shared airspace. The company revealed three additional vertiport sites for Dubai's network: Dubai Mall attracting nearly 111 million annual visitors annually, Atlantis the Royal luxury resort on Palm Jumeirah, and American University of Dubai serving Marina district. These join the planned Dubai International Airport vertiport, expected to open in Q1 2026. CEO JoeBen Bevirt stated that Joby is making incredible progress on all fronts as we look ahead to launching commercial passenger service in Dubai next year. The service targets 2026 launch, operating under a six-year exclusive agreement with Dubai's Roads and Transport Authority. The announcement coincides with daily flight demonstrations at Dubai Airshow 2025.
